title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: | Axis | FUGUE (Claude side) | Kernel (Codex side) | Current risk | |---|---|---|---| | Responsibility | Routing/judgment/dialogue owner; owns workflow-facing orchestration and handoff decisions ([CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CLAUDE.md#L25), [agent-orchestration/AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/AGENTS.md#L41)) | Local execution/runtime owner; owns planning diversity, implementation, verification evidence inside task boundary ([CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L28), [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L30)) | Low drift on high-level split; both documents consistently describe peer separation. | | Authority | Owns KPI/Story/Spec/purpose/priority/acceptance/final accept-or-replan ([CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CLAUDE.md#L26)) | May continue ticket execution but must not redefine KPI/Story/Spec/priority/acceptance/DoD ([CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L45), [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L53)) | Authority model is coherent; boundary is explicit and asymmetric by design. | | Runtime boundary | Global adapter says FUGUE remains `BLOCKED` when Claude unavailable, no auto-reroute to Kernel ([CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CLAUDE.md#L33)) | Kernel blocks explicit `/fugue` in Codex ([CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L17)); Kernel quorum does not require Claude ([CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L42)) | **High**: repo SSOT says active FUGUE runtime can auto-demote main to codex during Claude degradation/exhaustion ([agent-orchestration/AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/AGENTS.md#L56), [agent-orchestration/AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/AGENTS.md#L64)), which conflicts with global `FUGUE stays BLOCKED` contract. | | Current risk | FUGUE repo contract includes Hybrid/Failover codex-main operation under degradation ([agent-orchestration/AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/AGENTS.md#L40), [agent-orchestration/AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/AGENTS.md#L57)) | Kernel adapter positions `/vote` as local council continuation, not user approval ([CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L51)) | **Medium**: global vs repo outage policy mismatch creates ambiguous behavior during Claude rate-limit events; **Medium**: `/vote` semantics in Kernel adapter now diverge from earlier bounded-approval framing and can blur operator expectations.
